TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kassym-Jomart_Tokayev, title = Kassym-Jomart_Tokayev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kassym-Jomart_Tokayev} }

S.FORM: Kassym-Jomart Tokayev (Ść°Ť•ŅŚßÜŤč•ť¶¨ÁąĺÁČĻ¬∑śČėŚć°ŤĎČŚ§ę; ryax sa 17 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1953 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Kazakhstan ta' misuw hya' ga Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Kassym-Jomart Tokayev minkahul sa Alma-Ata na Kazakhstan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1953 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

Kassym-Jomart Tokayev (Ść°Ť•ŅŚßÜŤč•ť¶¨ÁąĺÁČĻ¬∑śČėŚć°ŤĎČŚ§ę; ryax sa 17 na byacing tay 5 squ kawas na 1953 - misu), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Kazakhstan ta' misuw hya' ga Kassym-Jomart Tokayev, aring ryax tay 20 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Kassym-Jomart Tokayev minkahul sa Alma-Ata na Kazakhstan. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1953 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw kazakńßs~…ētan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a kas~…ēs~…ējm-*omart tokaje*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral kas~…ēs~…ējm-*omart tokaje* minkańßul s~…ēa alma-ata na kazakńßs~…ētan. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
